language.label: Language
language.description: Choose the language used across the entire app.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Welcome back — let's manage your assets.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Manage your digital assets in one place.
register.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
register.createFailed: Could not create account. Please try again.

onboarding.title: Create your first organization
onboarding.subtitle: Hi {{name}}. Let's open a workspace to track your assets.

acceptInvite.notFoundDesc: This invite link may be invalid or expired. You can ask the sender for a new invite.
acceptInvite.alreadyAccepted: This invite has already been accepted
acceptInvite.requestNew: ask the sender for a new invite.
acceptInvite.adminCancelled: the invite was cancelled by an administrator.
acceptInvite.canSignIn: you can sign in and select the organization.
acceptInvite.wrongAccountWarning: This invite was sent to {{email}} but you are signed in as {{currentEmail}}. Please sign out and sign in with the correct account.
acceptInvite.noAccountNote: If you don't have an account, first register with {{email}}, then come back to this link.
acceptInvite.signOutAndBack: Sign out and sign in again
acceptInvite.acceptedToast: Invite accepted. Redirecting to the organization…

addAsset.selectTypeDesc: Pick a category to describe what you're tracking.
addAsset.templatesTitle: Or start from a popular provider
addAsset.templatesDesc: Jump straight to the details with type and vendor pre-filled.
addAsset.last4Help: For your safety, enter only the last 4 digits. We never store the full card number.
addAsset.billingCycleDayHelp: Which day of the month is the statement cut?
addAsset.dueDayHelp: Which day of the month is the payment due?
addAsset.autoAdvanceHelp: Automatically rolls over to the next month each cycle.
addAsset.detectFailed: Couldn't detect expiry. Please enter the date manually.
addAsset.detectNoExpiry: This domain has no public expiry date. Enter the date manually.
addAsset.detectNotFound: Domain not found in WHOIS. Check the spelling or enter the date manually.

assetDetail.creditCardAutoHelp: This card auto-renews monthly. Once the due date passes, the system rolls over to the next month and starts a new reminder cycle.
assetDetail.defaultPolicyDesc: Default Policy — Notifications at 30, 14, 7, and 1 days before expiration.
assetDetail.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this asset?

team.title: Team Members
team.roleDescriptionsText: OWNER — Full privileges, cannot be removed · ADMIN — Member management and org settings · MEMBER — Can add/edit assets · VIEWER — View only
team.inviteHelpShort: You can request a new invite from the person who sent it to you.
team.inviteHelp: Invite email is sent automatically. If the user doesn't have a RenewPilot account, they need to sign up first — invite link is valid for 7 days.

billing.smsProOnly: SMS and WhatsApp are available on Pro+ plans.
billing.contactBody: I would like to switch to the {{plan}} plan for the {{org}} organization.

notifications.preferencesDesc: Manage email, SMS, WhatsApp and Push notifications from the Settings page.

language.title: Language
language.desc: Choose the display language for RenewPilot. Your selection is saved in this browser.
language.label: Interface language

profile.title: Profile Settings
profile.avatarHelp: PNG, JPG or WEBP — max 10MB. Automatically resized to 256×256.
profile.cropTooBig: Photo too large — try zooming out and try again

organization.title: Organization Settings
organization.name: Organization Name
organization.adminOnly: Admin privileges are required to change organization settings.

security.title: Security
security.passwordHelp: Must be at least 8 characters, including 1 uppercase letter and 1 number.
security.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

notifications.title: Notification Preferences
notifications.desc: Choose which channels you want to receive notifications on.
notifications.emailDesc: Renewal reminders are sent via email
notifications.smsDesc: Important renewal reminders are sent via SMS (phone number required)
notifications.whatsappDesc: Renewal reminders are sent via WhatsApp

browserPush.title: Browser Push Notifications
browserPush.desc: Get a system notification on this device when something needs your attention — even when the tab is closed.
browserPush.unsupported: This browser doesn't support push notifications.
browserPush.denied: Notifications are blocked. Enable them in your browser site settings, then return to this page.
browserPush.notActive: Not enabled on this device yet.

reminders.title: Reminder Policies
reminders.desc: Set how many days before a renewal and via which channels notifications are sent. Negative values send after the date (escalated reminders).
reminders.noPolicies: No policies yet. A default policy will be created automatically…
reminders.name: Policy Name
reminders.daysRequired: Enter at least one day value
reminders.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the "{{name}}" policy?
reminders.bullet1: Default day values: 60, 30, 14, 7, 3, 1, 0 — days before renewal
reminders.bullet2: Negative values: -1, -3, -7, -14 — escalated reminders sent after the renewal date
reminders.bullet3: Every day at 08:00 UTC the system scans and sends the appropriate reminders
reminders.bullet4: The same notification is not sent twice on the same day (deduplication)
reminders.daysExampleHelp: e.g. 60, 30, 14, 7, 3, 1, 0, -1, -3, -7 = 60/30/14/7/3/1 days before, on the renewal day, 1/3/7 days after

avatarCrop.title: Crop Photo
avatarCrop.help: Drag to position, use the zoom slider to zoom in.

welcomeTour.welcomeSubtitle: Let's get you set up in 30 seconds. Here's what you can do with RenewPilot:
welcomeTour.feature1Desc: Domains, SSL, servers, licenses, credit cards — in one place.
welcomeTour.feature2Desc: Email, SMS, WhatsApp and Push reminders at the right time.
welcomeTour.feature3Desc: Cancel unused subscriptions before they auto-charge.
welcomeTour.purposeTitle: What do you want to track first?
welcomeTour.purposeSubtitle: Pick one and we'll take you straight to the setup form.

domain.title: Domain names
domain.desc: Track registrar renewal dates so you never lose a domain.

ssl.title: SSL certificates
ssl.desc: Get notified before certificates expire and sites break.

server.title: Servers & hosting
server.desc: VPS, dedicated servers, cloud hosting renewal dates.

license.title: Software licenses
license.desc: Annual or monthly SaaS and software subscriptions.

card.title: Credit card payments
card.desc: Statement and due dates, with monthly reminders.

other.title: Something else
other.desc: CDN, custom recurring payments — you pick the category.

asset.title: Add your first asset
asset.desc: Track a domain, server, SSL or license — the first of many.

profile.title: Complete your profile
profile.desc: Upload an avatar and phone number so we can reach you on every channel.

reminders.title: Set up reminders
reminders.desc: Default reminders fire 30 / 14 / 7 / 1 days before renewal. Tweak them anytime.

team.title: Invite a teammate
team.desc: Share the workload — add an admin, member or viewer.

tour.title: Replay the welcome tour
tour.desc: See how RenewPilot works in 30 seconds.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Forecast your upcoming renewal spend and spot the peaks.
reports.skippedAssets: {{count}} asset(s) were skipped because their currency can't be converted automatically.
reports.disclaimer: Forecast is approximate — based on each asset's renewal date, interval and price. Currency conversion uses static reference rates.

csvImport.buttonTitle: Bulk import assets from a CSV file
csvImport.title: Import assets from CSV
csvImport.uploadDesc: Upload a CSV file. We'll auto-detect columns and let you map anything we miss.
csvImport.mapDesc: Review the column mapping and preview. Rows with errors will be skipped.
csvImport.importDesc: Creating your assets — please don't close this window.
csvImport.clickToUpload: Click to upload a CSV file
csvImport.sampleHint: First time? Start from our sample template.
csvImport.defaultTypeTitle: No type column found — use this type for every row:

errors.notEnoughRows: CSV must have a header row and at least one data row.
errors.noDataRows: No data rows found in the file.
errors.parseFail: Could not parse the file — is it valid CSV?

shareLink.title: Share Links
shareLink.desc: Generate a read-only link anyone can open without signing in. The link only shows non-sensitive renewal info — license keys, IPs, and project details are hidden.
shareLink.copyOnceWarning: Copy this link now — for security we won't show it again.
shareLink.revokeConfirm: Revoke this link? Anyone with the URL will lose access immediately.

hero.title: Never miss another renewal.
hero.subtitle: One workspace for every domain, SSL cert, license and renewal date your business depends on. Pinged across every channel before they lapse.
hero.imageAlt: RenewPilot dashboard showing renewal countdowns and upcoming expirations

how.heading: From spreadsheet panic to calm in three steps
how.subheading: No agents to install. No vendor lock-in. Bring your renewals, leave with your sanity.

add.title: Add your assets
add.desc: Paste a domain and we pull the registrar and expiry via WHOIS. Add an SSL cert and we read the validTo. CSV import for everything else.

policy.title: Set the policy once
policy.desc: Pick the channels, the lead times (30/14/7/1 by default), and who gets pinged. Saved and reused for every new asset.

ping.title: We do the chasing
ping.desc: Reminders go out on email, SMS, WhatsApp, web push and in-app. You'll know weeks ahead, not the morning of.

pains.heading: The cost of one missed date
pains.subheading: A single forgotten renewal can erase a customer relationship. Here's what we stop from happening.

domain.title: Domain expired
domain.desc: The domain auto-renew failed silently. By the time you notice, a squatter has registered it.
domain.solution: Multi-channel reminders 30 / 14 / 7 / 1 days out — plus WHOIS verification.

ssl.title: SSL certificate lapsed
ssl.desc: At 3 a.m. on a Sunday your customers see a browser security warning and bounce.
ssl.solution: Track common name, issuer and validTo for every cert. Pages and people get pinged.

license.title: License renewal missed
license.desc: Seats expire mid-sprint. Builds break. Procurement takes a week to push a PO through.
license.solution: Owners and finance get the same heads-up, in their language, on the channel they use.

features.heading: Everything you need to stay ahead of expirations
features.subheading: One workspace for every renewable thing your business depends on.

multiAsset.title: Multi-asset tracking
multiAsset.desc: Domains, SSL certs, software licenses, hosting, CDN, servers and credit cards — all in one timeline.

multiChannel.title: Multi-channel reminders
multiChannel.desc: Email, SMS, WhatsApp, web push and in-app notifications. Set escalation policies per asset.

team.title: Team collaboration
team.desc: Owner, admin, member and viewer roles. Invite by email, scope access per organization.

whois.title: WHOIS auto-detect
whois.desc: Paste a domain — we pull the registrar, expiration date and auto-renew flag automatically.

share.title: Read-only share links
share.desc: Send an SSL or domain summary to a client without granting account access. Revoke anytime.

i18n.title: 5 languages
i18n.desc: English, Turkish, German, French, Spanish — every label, every notification, every reminder.

assets.title: See everything at a glance
assets.body: Filter by type, status, days-until-renewal or owner. The list, not your spreadsheet, is the source of truth.
assets.alt: Asset list view with filters and renewal countdown column

calendar.title: Visualize your renewal calendar
calendar.body: Spot clusters of expirations weeks before they hit. Drag a month forward to plan procurement instead of putting out fires.

detail.title: Drill into any asset
detail.body: One page per asset with renewal history, reminder timeline, owner, vendor, cost, and a quick-action sidebar to renew, edit or share.
detail.alt: Asset detail page with quick actions sidebar

reminders.title: Set reminder policies once
reminders.body: Pick the channels, the lead times and the audience. The same policy applies to every new asset until you change it.

share.title: Share without giving access
share.body: Generate SHA-256 hashed, optionally-expiring links to a single asset. Recipients see only the renewal info — no license keys, no IPs, no project details.
share.alt: Share link dialog with one-time token banner

i18n.heading: Speak your team's language
i18n.subheading: RenewPilot ships in English, Turkish, German, French and Spanish — UI and notifications both.

trust.heading: Engineered without surprises
trust.subheading: Decisions that the technical buyer can sign off in one read-through.

encryption.title: Plaintext-zero secrets
encryption.desc: Share-link tokens stored as SHA-256 hashes — the original is shown to you exactly once. Passwords bcrypted with cost 12.

isolation.title: Hard tenant boundary
isolation.desc: Every query is scoped to your organization. Cross-org lookups return a 404, never a 403, so existence can't be probed.

hosting.title: EU-hosted by default
hosting.desc: Runs on Vercel + Neon Postgres in Frankfurt. TLS in transit, encryption at rest, GDPR-aware data handling.

audit.title: Yours to export
audit.desc: Every renewal, invitation and access change is logged. JSON/CSV export for assets and history at any time.

cta.heading: Take the calendar off your shoulders.
cta.subheading: Create a workspace, add your first asset, get your first reminder. Free during beta — no card, no setup call.
cta.disclaimer: Cancel anytime · your data stays exportable · self-hostable on request

footer.tagline: The renewal tracker built by operators tired of missed dates.

publicShare.unavailableDesc: This share link is invalid, has expired, or was revoked. Please ask the sender for a fresh one.
publicShare.disclaimer: This is a read-only snapshot. Sensitive details such as credentials, license keys, and internal identifiers are intentionally hidden.
